column1: I will go to the concert, but ___ you go as well.
I brought along a sandwich, ___ I got hungry.
___ she calls me, I feel very happy.
Take this photo, ___ you can remember me.
I will not talk to him ___ he apologizes for what he did.
She spoke ___ she knew what she was talking about, but she didn't.
___ the police arrived, we had to end the party.
I couldn't figure out ___ he said what he said.
I bought you a birthday card ___ I like you.
